title: Advanced Flight Rockets
description: Adds recipes of firework rockets with longer flight time.
body:
## Longer Flight Time
This datapack adds 5 new **shapeless** crafting recipes for `firework rockets` with extended flight duration (4 to 8 seconds), requiring 4 to 8 `gunpowder` respectively. These are especially useful for boosting with elytra.

Сheck the recipes in the **gallery** or in the window **below**.

<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>

Shapeless recipe for a firework rocket with a flight duration 4
![Recipe for a firework rocket with a 4-second flight duration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dab7605173bfb8720428aebbf6d27da715803af.png)
  
Shapeless recipe for a firework rocket with a flight duration 5
![Recipe for a firework rocket with a 5-second flight duration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d92349f0f6e4c9702416ccbfe30f6db878924f0.png)

Shapeless recipe for a firework rocket with a flight duration 6
![Recipe for a firework rocket with a 6-second flight duration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03e4937bd57cb3a0337dc8d88fa30ffb906d5695.png)

Shapeless recipe for a firework rocket with a flight duration 7
![Recipe for a firework rocket with a 7-second flight duration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/767760c8f44928cb1a49792e51e0a44dbe835510.png)

Shapeless recipe for a firework rocket with a flight duration 8
![Recipe for a firework rocket with a 8-second flight duration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98fb12f68ed04d24834ad98a19e5767cb943acf5.png)

</details>
